## Premium oral care from Switzerland

###### Snow Pearl combines luxurious oral care with modern dentistry. High-quality ingredients, innovative formulations, and a clear focus on prevention create a premium dental care that goes far beyond classic oral hygiene.

###### Snow Pearl stands for a new generation of dental care. High-quality dental care products, developed with sound dental expertise, bring professional oral care directly to your home.

###### **At its core is a coordinated system: the electric sonic toothbrush for gentle biofilm control, toothpaste with BioMin® and fluoride for remineralization, and Whitening Foam as supplementary care for hard-to-reach areas and gentle whitening.**

###### **Particular focus is placed on the remineralization of tooth enamel, the care of sensitive teeth, and gentle, modern oral care for daily use.**

## The Science Behind SNOW PEARL

This concept combines bioactive dental care, remineralization, and protection for sensitive teeth with modern sonic technology.

###### **SNOW PEARL is based on an advanced, multimodal concept of modern oral care:**

*   ###### **Mechanical biofilm removal** through precise sonic technology

*   ###### **Biomimetic remineralization** through Bioactive Glass (BioMin®) in a bioactive toothpaste

*   ###### **Continuous fluoride release** for sustainable strengthening of tooth enamel

*   ###### **Gentle whitening technology** for aesthetic brightening without structural stress

###### In this synergistic combination, SNOW PEARL unites current findings in preventive and regenerative dentistry into a holistic care approach – for long-term healthy, resilient, and aesthetically optimized teeth.

![Image 9](https://snow-pearl.com/cdn/shop/files/Lila_Plain.webp?v=1774290912&width=3000)

## BioMin® + Fluoride Synergy

Combination of bioactive glass (calcium sodium fluorophosphosilicate) and sodium fluoride for simultaneous remineralization and enamel strengthening.

![Image 10](https://snow-pearl.com/cdn/shop/files/Lila_Plain.webp?v=1774290912&width=3000)

## Long-term impact instead of instant gratification

Continuous release of calcium, phosphate, and fluoride ions enables protection and regeneration for several hours.

![Image 11](https://snow-pearl.com/cdn/shop/files/Lila_Plain.webp?v=1774290912&width=3000)

## Deep Remineralization

Formation of a hydroxyapatite-like protective layer that structurally strengthens weakened tooth enamel and makes it more resistant.
